item.name: Model O Identification Key
item.description: A thin, rectangular piece of some unknown alloy. Placing it near your Model O will magically bring the machine to life.

mount.name: Model O
mount.action: Call into battle your Model O, autonomous aerial transport device constructed in Omega's interdimensional manufactory.
mount.description: Though it is difficult to fathom why Omega would require a weaponless flying mount designed to comfortably accommodate a denizen of Hydaelyn, Garlond Ironworks engineers posit the construct was fabricated in an attempt to better understand its enemies.
